info.title: Wendao Gateway
info.description: Stable contract surface for the Wendao HTTP gateway, including health, studio, VFS, graph, and search endpoints.

get.description: Return a lightweight readiness response for the Wendao gateway process.

200.description: Gateway process is alive and able to serve requests.

503.description: Gateway process is not yet ready to accept traffic.

get.description: Return graph statistics when an index is loaded, or an explanatory error payload when the gateway has no active index.

200.description: Graph statistics payload or a no-index status payload.

500.description: Gateway failed to collect or serialize statistics.

get.description: Report whether the notification worker is active and whether webhook delivery is configured.

200.description: Notification worker status and webhook configuration state.

500.description: Gateway failed to resolve notification worker state.

get.description: Return the top-level virtual file system entries visible to the studio explorer.

200.description: Visible VFS entries at the current studio root.

400.description: Studio UI configuration is missing or does not expose any visible roots.

get.description: Scan the configured studio file tree and return structured entry metadata for explorer rendering.

200.description: Structured scan result with entries, counts, and scan timing.

400.description: Studio UI configuration is missing or does not expose any visible roots.

get.description: Return UTF-8 file content and content-type metadata for one file in the virtual file system.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Project-relative path for the file to read.

200.description: Requested file content and content metadata.

400.description: The requested path is missing or invalid.

get.description: Return metadata for one VFS file or directory selected by project-relative path.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Project-relative path for the VFS entry.

200.description: Metadata for the requested VFS entry.

404.description: The requested VFS entry does not exist.

get.description: Return the current graph topology projected into a 3D-friendly layout payload.

200.description: 3D topology payload with nodes, links, and clusters.

400.description: Studio UI configuration is missing or the topology cannot be built for the current scope.

get.description: Return aggregated corpus build status for the Studio search plane.

200.description: Current search-plane index status across all corpora.

500.description: The gateway failed while computing the search-plane index status.

get.description: Return the current studio UI configuration, including project-scoped explorer settings.

200.description: Current studio UI configuration.

500.description: Gateway failed to read the current studio UI configuration.

post.description: Replace the current studio UI configuration and clear any cached graph or symbol indexes that depend on it.

projects.description: Configured studio project roots and indexed directories.

200.description: Updated studio UI configuration.

400.description: The submitted UI configuration payload was invalid.

get.description: Return the gateway-reported capability catalog for the current studio runtime, including supported code language identifiers.

200.description: Current studio UI capabilities.

500.description: Gateway failed to read the current studio UI capabilities.

get.description: Return the currently resolved generic plugin artifact for the selected plugin and artifact identifier. The default response is structured JSON; pass `format=toml` to inspect the same artifact as a TOML document.

parameters.name: artifact_id
parameters.description: Artifact identifier to inspect for the selected plugin.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional response format for plugin artifact inspection.

200.description: Resolved plugin artifact in the requested inspection format.

500.description: Gateway failed to resolve or render the selected plugin artifact.

get.description: Return the currently resolved Julia rerank deployment artifact used by the studio and link-graph runtime. The default response is structured JSON; pass `format=toml` to inspect the same artifact as a TOML document.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Optional response format for deployment artifact inspection.

200.description: Resolved Julia deployment artifact in the requested inspection format.

text/plain.example:
artifact_schema_version = "v1"
generated_at = "2026-03-27T16:00:00+00:00"
base_url = "http://127.0.0.1:18080"
route = "/rerank"
health_route = "/healthz"
schema_version = "v1"
timeout_secs = 30

[launch]
launcher_path = ".data/WendaoAnalyzer/scripts/run_analyzer_service.sh"
args = ["--service-mode", "stream", "--analyzer-strategy", "linear_blend"]

500.description: Gateway failed to resolve or render the current Julia deployment artifact.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence repository overview flow for one configured repository and return the normalized module, symbol, example, and documentation counts.

200.description: Repo overview payload with normalized repository counts.

400.description: The repo overview request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

example.message: `repo` is required

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the repo overview task.

get.description: Return the current Studio repo-index queue and aggregate lifecycle counts for all configured repositories, or for one repository when `repo` is provided.

parameters.name: repo
parameters.description: Optional registered repository identifier to filter one repo row from the current status snapshot.

200.description: Aggregated repo-index lifecycle status and per-repository snapshot rows.

500.description: The gateway failed while reading the repo-index status snapshot.

post.description: Enqueue background repo-index work for all configured repositories, or for one repository when `repo` is provided, and return the current repo-index status snapshot.

200.description: Aggregated repo-index status after enqueueing the requested repositories.

400.description: The repo index request was invalid or the requested repository could not be resolved.

example.message: No configured repository is available for repo indexing

500.description: The gateway failed while enqueueing repo-index work.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence module-search flow for one configured repository and return matching normalized module records.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of module rows to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Module search payload with normalized module rows.

400.description: The module-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the module-search task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence symbol-search flow for one configured repository and return matching normalized symbol records.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of symbol rows to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Symbol search payload with normalized symbol rows.

400.description: The symbol-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the symbol-search task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence example-search flow for one configured repository and return matching normalized example records.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of example rows to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Example search payload with normalized example rows.

400.description: The example-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the example-search task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence import-search flow for one configured repository and return normalized import records filtered by package name, module-qualified-name, or both.

parameters.name: package
parameters.description: Optional package filter. At least one of `package` or `module` is required.

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Optional module-qualified-name filter. At least one of `package` or `module` is required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of import rows to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Import search payload with normalized import rows.

400.description: The import-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

value.message: at least one of `package` or `module` is required

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the import-search task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence doc-coverage flow for one configured repository and return normalized documentation rows plus covered and uncovered symbol counts.

200.description: Doc coverage payload with normalized doc rows and coverage counts.

400.description: The doc-coverage request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

example.message: `repo` is required

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the doc-coverage task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence sync/status flow for one configured repository and return lifecycle, drift, freshness, and grouped status-summary metadata.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Repo sync mode. Defaults to ensure.

200.description: Repo sync payload with lifecycle, drift, freshness, and grouped status summary.

400.description: The repo sync request was invalid or the configured repository source could not be prepared.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the repo sync task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return the normalized projected page records.

200.description: Projected page payload with deterministic page records.

400.description: The projected-pages request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

example.message: `repo` is required

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-pages task.

get.summary: Inspect deterministic projected deep-wiki gaps through the docs surface
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic deep-wiki planning flow for one configured repository and return the docs-facing projected gap report without introducing any generated wiki content.

200.description: Docs-facing projected deep-wiki gap report with deterministic summary and gap rows.

400.description: The docs projected-gap-report request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

example.message: `repo` is required

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs projected-gap-report task.

get.summary: Open one deterministic deep-wiki planner item
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic deep-wiki planner flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return one stable projected gap together with its mixed retrieval hit and page-centric navigation bundle.

parameters.name: family_kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family to include as a deterministic cluster in the navigation bundle.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return. Defaults to 5.

parameters.name: family_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: One docs-facing deterministic planner item bundle.

400.description: The docs planner-item request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected gap or owning projected page identifiers were not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected gap `repo:gateway-sync:projection-gap:documentation_page_without_anchor:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/missing.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs planner-item task.

get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic deep-wiki planner discovery flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return stable projected gaps ranked by explicit planner evidence.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Planner search string matched against gap title, path, entity id, identifiers, and stable kind tokens.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of planner hits to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic planner search hits.

400.description: The docs planner-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs planner-search task.

get.summary: Open deterministic deep-wiki planner queue groups
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic deep-wiki planner queue flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return grouped projected gaps previewed by stable gap kind.

parameters.name: per_kind_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of preview gaps to return for each gap kind. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic planner queue groups.

400.description: The docs planner-queue request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs planner-queue task.

get.summary: Open deterministic deep-wiki planner rank hits
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic deep-wiki planner rank flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return stable projected gaps ordered by deterministic planner priority evidence.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of ranked planner gaps to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic planner rank hits.

reasons.detail: base priority from projected gap kind `symbol_reference_without_documentation`
base priority from projected gap kind `documentation_page_without_anchor`

400.description: The docs planner-rank request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs planner-rank task.

get.summary: Open deterministic deep-wiki planner workset bundles
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic deep-wiki planner workset flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository, keep the grouped queue preview, rank matching projected gaps deterministically, expose quota-band balancing evidence across gap kinds and page families, carry explicit quota hints on each grouped gap-kind lane and nested page-family lane, and open a bounded batch of planner-item bundles from that ranked selection.

parameters.name: per_kind_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of preview gaps to keep for each gap kind before batch opening. Defaults to 3.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of planner items to open across the queue preview. Defaults to 3.

parameters.name: family_kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family to include as a deterministic cluster in each navigation bundle.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return for each opened planner item. Defaults to 5.

parameters.name: family_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic planner workset bundles.

reasons.detail: base priority from projected gap kind `symbol_reference_without_documentation`
base priority from projected gap kind `symbol_reference_without_documentation`

400.description: The docs planner-workset request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: One selected projected gap or owning projected page identifiers were not present for the configured repository.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs planner-workset task.

get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected-page retrieval flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return matching projected page records, optionally filtered by page family.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of projected pages to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic projected page search payload.

400.description: The docs search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs search task.

get.summary: Search deterministic mixed docs retrieval hits
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected mixed-retrieval flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return matching projected page hits together with builder-native projected page-index node hits, optionally filtered by page family.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of mixed retrieval hits to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Docs-facing mixed retrieval payload with deterministic projected-page and page-index-node hits.

400.description: The docs retrieval request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs retrieval task.

get.summary: Open one deterministic mixed docs retrieval context
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected mixed-retrieval-context flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return the center mixed hit plus related projected pages and optional builder-native node neighborhood.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description: Optional stable projected page-index node identifier.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return. Defaults to 5.

200.description: Docs-facing mixed retrieval-context payload for one stable center hit.

400.description: The docs retrieval-context request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected hit identifiers were not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page-index node `reference/solve-69592caeddee#missing` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/solve.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs retrieval-context task.

get.summary: Open one deterministic mixed docs retrieval hit
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected mixed-retrieval-hit flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return one projected page hit or one builder-native projected page-index node hit by stable identifiers.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description: Optional stable page-index node identifier. When omitted, the endpoint returns a page-level hit.

200.description: One docs-facing deterministic mixed retrieval hit.

400.description: The docs retrieval-hit request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page or page-index node identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page-index node `reference/solve-69592caeddee#missing` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/solve.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs retrieval-hit task.

get.summary: Open one deterministic projected docs page
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected-page lookup flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return one projected page record by stable page identifier.

200.description: One docs-facing deterministic projected page record.

400.description: The docs page request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/missing.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs page task.

get.summary: Inspect deterministic projected docs family context
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected-page family-context flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return one stable center page together with related projected pages grouped by page family and ranked by shared-anchor evidence.

parameters.name: per_kind_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return for each page family. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic projected page-family context payload grouped by page family.

400.description: The docs family-context request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/missing.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs family-context task.

get.summary: Search deterministic projected docs family clusters
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected-page family-search flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return matching center pages with grouped family clusters ranked by shared-anchor evidence.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Projected-page search string for center pages.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family filter applied to center pages.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of center-page hits to return. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: per_kind_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return for each page family. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic projected page-family search payload with grouped family clusters per matched center page.

400.description: The docs family-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs family-search task.

get.summary: Open one deterministic projected docs family cluster
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected-page family-cluster flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return one grouped page-family cluster for a stable center page plus one required projected-page family.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Required projected-page family for the returned cluster.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic projected page-family cluster payload for one stable center page and one required page family.

400.description: The docs family-cluster request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page family was not present for the configured repository and center page.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page family `Tutorial` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/solve.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs family-cluster task.

get.summary: Open one deterministic projected docs navigation bundle
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected-page navigation flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and return one page-centric navigation bundle, including the center mixed hit, related projected pages, the full projected page-index tree, optional local node context, and an optional requested page-family cluster.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description: Optional stable projected page-index node identifier.

parameters.name: family_kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family to include as a deterministic cluster in the navigation bundle.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return. Defaults to 5.

parameters.name: family_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic projected page navigation bundle for one stable projected page.

400.description: The docs navigation request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page, node, or family cluster was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/missing.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs navigation task.

get.summary: Search deterministic projected docs navigation bundles
get.description: Run the Wendao deterministic projected-page navigation search flow through the docs namespace for one configured repository and expand each matched center page into a page-centric navigation bundle. Optional family_kind clusters are included only for hits that can resolve the requested family.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Projected-page search string for center pages.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family filter applied to center pages.

parameters.name: family_kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family to include as a deterministic cluster for each hit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matched center pages to expand. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return for each navigation bundle. Defaults to 5.

parameters.name: family_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Docs-facing deterministic projected page navigation search payload with navigation bundles per matched center page.

400.description: The docs navigation-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the docs navigation-search task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection gap flow for one configured repository and return the planner-facing projected gap report.

200.description: Projected deep-wiki gap report with deterministic summary and gap rows.

400.description: The projected-gap-report request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

example.message: `repo` is required

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-gap-report task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return one projected page record by stable page identifier.

200.description: One deterministic projected page record.

400.description: The projected-page request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/missing.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page task.

get.summary: Inspect one deterministic projected page-index node
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return one builder-native projected page-index node by stable page and node identifiers.

200.description: One deterministic builder-native projected page-index node hit.

400.description: The projected-page-index-node request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page-index node identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page-index node `reference/solve-69592caeddee#missing` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/solve.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-index-node task.

get.summary: Inspect one deterministic mixed Stage-2 retrieval hit
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic retrieval flow for one configured repository and return one projected page hit or one builder-native projected page-index node hit by stable identifiers.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description: Optional stable page-index node identifier. When omitted, the endpoint returns a page-level hit.

200.description: One deterministic mixed retrieval hit.

400.description: The projected-retrieval-hit request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page or page-index node identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page-index node `reference/solve-69592caeddee#missing` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/solve.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-retrieval-hit task.

get.summary: Inspect deterministic mixed Stage-2 retrieval context
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic retrieval flow for one configured repository and return one stable center hit together with related projected pages and optional builder-native node neighborhood context.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return. Defaults to 5.

200.description: Deterministic mixed retrieval context payload with one center hit, related projected pages, and optional node neighborhood context.

400.description: The projected-retrieval-context request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page or page-index node identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page-index node `reference/solve-69592caeddee#missing` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/solve.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-retrieval-context task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return one stable center page together with related projected pages grouped by page family and ranked by shared-anchor evidence.

parameters.name: per_kind_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return for each page family. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Deterministic projected page-family context payload grouped by page family.

400.description: The projected-page-family-context request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/missing.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-family-context task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository, search stable center pages, and return grouped page-family clusters for each matched center page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Projected-page family search string applied to center pages.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family filter applied to center pages.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of center-page hits to return. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: per_kind_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return for each page family. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Deterministic projected page-family cluster search payload.

400.description: The projected-page-family-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-family-search task.

get.summary: Inspect one deterministic projected page-family cluster
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return one grouped page-family cluster for a stable center page plus one required projected-page family.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Required projected-page family for the returned cluster.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Deterministic projected page-family cluster payload for one stable center page and one required page family.

400.description: The projected-page-family-cluster request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page family was not present for the configured repository and center page.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page family `Tutorial` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/solve.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-family-cluster task.

get.summary: Inspect one deterministic projected page navigation bundle
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return one page-centric navigation bundle, including the center mixed hit, related projected pages, the full projected page-index tree, optional local node context, and an optional requested page-family cluster.

parameters.name: node_id
parameters.description: Optional stable projected page-index node identifier.

parameters.name: family_kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family to include as a deterministic cluster in the navigation bundle.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return. Defaults to 5.

parameters.name: family_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Deterministic projected page navigation bundle for one stable projected page.

400.description: The projected-page-navigation request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page, node, or family cluster was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page family `Tutorial` in page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:symbol:repo:gateway-sync:symbol:GatewaySyncPkg.solve`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-navigation task.

get.summary: Search deterministic projected page navigation bundles
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projected-page search flow for one configured repository and expand each matched center page into a page-centric navigation bundle. Optional family_kind clusters are included only for hits that can resolve the requested family.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Projected-page search string for center pages.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family filter applied to center pages.

parameters.name: family_kind
parameters.description: Optional projected-page family to include as a deterministic cluster for each hit.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matched center pages to expand. Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: related_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return for each navigation bundle. Defaults to 5.

parameters.name: family_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of related projected pages to return in the requested family cluster. Defaults to 3.

200.description: Projected page navigation search payload with deterministic navigation bundles per matched center page.

400.description: The projected-page-navigation-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-navigation-search task.

get.summary: Inspect one deterministic projected page-index tree
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return one builder-native projected page-index tree by stable page identifier.

200.description: One deterministic builder-native projected page-index tree.

400.description: The projected-page-index-tree request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

404.description: The requested projected page identifier was not present for the configured repository.

example.message: repo `gateway-sync` does not contain projected page `repo:gateway-sync:projection:reference:doc:repo:gateway-sync:doc:docs/missing.md`

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-index-tree task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic retrieval flow over builder-native projected page-index trees and return matching section-level hits, optionally filtered by page family.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of projected page-index node hits to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Projected page-index tree retrieval payload with deterministic section-level hits.

400.description: The projected-page-index-tree-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-index-tree-search task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projected-page retrieval flow for one configured repository and return matching projected page records, optionally filtered by page family.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of projected pages to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Projected page search payload with deterministic projected page rows.

400.description: The projected-page-search request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-search task.

get.summary: Search deterministic mixed Stage-2 retrieval hits
get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic retrieval flow for one configured repository and return matching projected page hits together with builder-native projected page-index node hits, optionally filtered by page family.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of mixed retrieval hits to return. Defaults to 10.

200.description: Mixed retrieval payload with deterministic projected-page and page-index-node hits.

400.description: The projected-retrieval request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-retrieval task.

get.description: Run the Wendao Repo Intelligence Stage-2 deterministic projection flow for one configured repository and return projected page-index trees built through the real page-index builder.

200.description: Projected page-index tree payload with deterministic builder-native trees.

400.description: The projected-page-index-trees request was invalid or the configured repository could not be analyzed.

example.message: `repo` is required

500.description: The gateway failed while executing the projected-page-index-trees task.
